title: citrus × aurantium subsp. japonica
intro: Citrus × aurantium subsp. japonica, also known as Japanese bitter orange or yuja, is a plant species native to East Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subsp. japonica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or extract, and is commonly used in traditional medicine in Korea and other East Asian countries.
